requirement_topic.en: T&TEC Grid Connection — 115/230 V, 60 Hz Revalidation
requirement_topic.zh: T&TEC并网接入——115/230 V、60 Hz重新验证
requirement_topic.zht: T&TEC併網接入——115/230 V、60 Hz重新驗證

summary.en: Trinidad and Tobago's electricity system is supplied by the Trinidad and Tobago Electricity Commission (T&TEC) and regulated by the Regulated Industries Commission (RIC). The low-voltage environment is 115/230 V at 60 Hz, reflecting a US-heritage Americas electrical system. Any grid-connected EV charger must be assessed for site supply capacity, metering, protection coordination, harmonics, power quality, earthing, and utility connection acceptance. The 60 Hz frequency is not a minor paperwork difference: PCS or inverter firmware, PFC stages, protection timing, magnetics, relays, fans, metering, and thermal behaviour must be validated at the target voltage and frequency before deployment.
summary.zh: 特立尼达和多巴哥电力系统由特立尼达和多巴哥电力委员会（T&TEC）供电，并由受监管行业委员会（RIC）监管。低压环境为115/230 V、60 Hz，属于美国体系传承的美洲电气系统。任何并网电动汽车充电桩均须评估场站供电容量、计量、保护配合、谐波、电能质量、接地及公用事业接入验收。60 Hz频率并非轻微文件差异：PCS或逆变器固件、功率因数校正级、保护时序、磁性器件、继电器、风扇、计量和热表现均须在目标电压和频率下验证后方可部署。
summary.zht: 千里達及托巴哥電力系統由千里達及托巴哥電力委員會（T&TEC）供電，並由受監管行業委員會（RIC）監管。低壓環境為115/230 V、60 Hz，屬於美國體系傳承的美洲電氣系統。任何併網電動汽車充電樁均須評估場站供電容量、計量、保護配合、諧波、電能質量、接地及公用事業接入驗收。60 Hz頻率並非輕微文件差異：PCS或逆變器固件、功率因數校正級、保護時序、磁性器件、繼電器、風扇、計量和熱表現均須在目標電壓和頻率下驗證後方可部署。

standards_or_laws: T&TEC grid-connection, metering, and service requirements
RIC regulatory oversight of electricity transmission and distribution
Trinidad and Tobago low-voltage supply: 115/230 V, 60 Hz
IEC 61000 series — electromagnetic compatibility and power quality reference
IEEE / utility power-quality practice where specified by project or utility

summary.en: China domestic charger installations are commonly designed for 220 V single-phase / 380 V three-phase at 50 Hz, with project acceptance by the local Chinese grid operator. Design evidence is typically based on GB/T 18487.1-2023, GB/T 20234 connectors, and GB/T 27930 communication for DC charging. This is not directly transferable to Trinidad and Tobago because both frequency and voltage differ from the China baseline.
summary.zh: 中国国内充电桩安装通常面向220 V单相 / 380 V三相、50 Hz供电设计，并由中国本地电网运营商进行项目验收。设计证据通常依据GB/T 18487.1-2023、GB/T 20234接口，以及直流充电GB/T 27930通信。由于频率和电压均不同，该基线不能直接转用于特立尼达和多巴哥。
summary.zht: 中國國內充電樁安裝通常面向220 V單相 / 380 V三相、50 Hz供電設計，並由中國本地電網運營商進行項目驗收。設計證據通常依據GB/T 18487.1-2023、GB/T 20234接口，以及直流充電GB/T 27930通訊。由於頻率和電壓均不同，該基線不能直接轉用於千里達及托巴哥。

standards_or_laws: China local grid operator project-acceptance requirements

gap.en: Exporters must confirm that the charger input covers the specific Trinidad and Tobago site supply at 115/230 V, 60 Hz; revalidate PFC, rectifiers, transformer or inductor magnetics, protection timing, metering accuracy, firmware frequency assumptions, thermal ratings, leakage-current devices, and harmonic emissions at 60 Hz; and obtain T&TEC site connection acceptance where required. A China-only 220/380 V, 50 Hz design is not grid-ready for Trinidad and Tobago.
gap.zh: 出口商须确认充电桩输入覆盖特立尼达和多巴哥具体场站的115/230 V、60 Hz供电；按60 Hz重新验证功率因数校正、整流器、变压器或电感磁性器件、保护时序、计量精度、固件频率假设、热额定值、漏电保护器件和谐波发射；并在需要时取得T&TEC场站接入验收。仅面向中国220/380 V、50 Hz的设计不具备进入特立尼达和多巴哥电网的条件。
gap.zht: 出口商須確認充電樁輸入覆蓋千里達及托巴哥具體場站的115/230 V、60 Hz供電；按60 Hz重新驗證功率因數校正、整流器、變壓器或電感磁性器件、保護時序、計量精度、固件頻率假設、熱額定值、漏電保護器件和諧波發射；並在需要時取得T&TEC場站接入驗收。僅面向中國220/380 V、50 Hz的設計不具備進入千里達及托巴哥電網的條件。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for grid-connected installations — confirm site-specific T&TEC service, metering, protection, and connection requirements; 60 Hz and 115/230 V compatibility must be proven for the installed charger
mandatory_status.cn: China domestic grid acceptance is not a T&TEC approval substitute; 220/380 V 50 Hz China design evidence does not prove 115/230 V 60 Hz compatibility

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] A Trinidad and Tobago-ready charger needs 115/230 V 60 Hz input validation, 60 Hz firmware and magnetics review, site power-quality evidence, and T&TEC connection coordination. China domestic 220/380 V 50 Hz evidence alone is not sufficient.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 面向特立尼达和多巴哥的充电桩须具备115/230 V 60 Hz输入验证、60 Hz固件及磁性器件审查、场站电能质量证据和T&TEC接入协调。仅有中国国内220/380 V 50 Hz证据并不足够。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 面向千里達及托巴哥的充電樁須具備115/230 V 60 Hz輸入驗證、60 Hz固件及磁性器件審查、場站電能質量證據和T&TEC接入協調。僅有中國國內220/380 V 50 Hz證據並不足夠。
